question: What are the top 10 best-selling products by total quantity sold?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Show products with low stock levels, less than 10 units remaining
ground_truth_sql: SELECT name, stock_quantity FROM products WHERE stock_quantity < 10 ORDER BY stock_quantity ASC;
notes: Reorder alert query; may return empty if seed data has stock > 10

question: Calculate average customer rating for each product category
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name AS category, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

question: Which are the 5 most reviewed products?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY review_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question: Find products that have never received a review
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, p.price FROM products p LEFT JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE r.product_id IS NULL;

question: Show minimum, maximum, and average price of products in each category
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name AS category, MIN(p.price) AS min_price, MAX(p.price) AS max_price, AVG(p.price) AS avg_price, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name ORDER BY avg_price DESC;

question: Find products ordered by more than one distinct customer
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS customer_count FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) > 1 ORDER BY customer_count DESC;

question: Which category has the most products?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name AS category, COUNT(p.product_id) AS product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name ORDER BY product_count DESC LIMIT 1;

question: Show total revenue and total units sold for each product
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_revenue FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
notes: Two aggregates in single GROUP BY

question: List products that are out of stock
ground_truth_sql: SELECT product_id, name, price FROM products WHERE stock_quantity = 0;
notes: Zero stock filter; may return empty on seed data — valid
